No node started

Node

Start the embedded protocol node, then dial a peer.

Hosted sides

Each side is an independent identity with its own QUIC endpoint (spec §7.6). Click a side to make it active — Connect, Send, and Pair below operate from the active side.

    Dial peer

    Connect to another node by network address, from the active hosted side.

    Send a DM

    Sent over the active side's open session to its connected peer.

    Inbox

    DMs arriving on this node, newest first.

      Pair another device

      Generate a QR for the active side. Show it on the existing device — a new device scans it (or pastes the URI below) to install this side and become a co-holder. The QR carries a one-time nonce valid for 10 minutes.

      Pair this device

      On the new device: paste the URI from the existing device's QR to install its side here.
